name: Accelerated Death Benefits for Terminally or Chronically Ill

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must be certified as terminally ill (death expected within 24 months) or chronically ill by a licensed health care practitioner.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Amounts received under a life insurance contract or via a viatical settlement by a terminally or chronically ill individual are treated as paid by reason of death and excluded from gross income.
